title: Executor loop: re-aim event-sourced grind runtime (D14)
description: Continues archived wgclw.30 (event-sourced grind runtime; wgclw.30.7 was in_progress at freeze — see SAVEPOINTS/2026-07-21-beads-final-export.jsonl). Becomes the executor loop of the new pipeline: dispatch scaffold→green workers, bounded budgets, typed park reasons; append-only event log as source of truth with derived projections; retires the bookkeeper agent. NOT an upgrade to the orchestrated-grind skill. Gated on V1: verify executor-loop fit against the grind spec before S9 scoping. Admission: prevents = human babysitting of dispatch/park/escalate and hand-maintained state drift; cost = grind runtime scope; remove-if = V1 shows unfit, then re-scope S9.

title: Harness rework
description: Charter: docs/specs/2026-07-21-harness-rework-way-forward.md (D1–D20). Rebuild the harness: spec contract with ACs as the review-termination condition; scaffold-as-plan; self-managed class-specific reviews emitting Mechanical/Advisory verdicts; PR as thin merge vehicle; park-with-typed-reason; workcli-first tracker facade; zero-based instruction surface under the 10k-token admission bar. Old tracker frozen 2026-07-22: committed export SAVEPOINTS/2026-07-21-beads-final-export.jsonl + cold archive ~/beads-archives/agents-config-2026-07-22.
acceptance_criteria: AC1 always-on surface ≤10k tokens, installer-enforced. AC2 zero conflicting deployed artifacts. AC3 100% admission records on deployed rules/skills/commands. AC4 spec lint rejects specs lacking AC section + per-slice ACs. AC5 wait-for-pr-comments, reply-and-resolve-pr-threads, monitor-pr, writing-plans, and deleted prgroom modules absent from src/ and all deploy targets. AC6 config-prose PRs: median bot-review rounds ≤1 and median fix-commits-after-first-review ≤1. AC7 interventions-per-PR reported under bot identity for every PR in window. AC8 pre-PR cycle time (claim→PR-open) reported per work item. AC9 termination: AC1–AC5 hold + 10 consecutive PRs meeting AC6–AC8 → milestone closes, harness work loses standing track.

title: prgroom carve: gh adapter missing --paginate on list reads (was j8pdq)
description: GhCli.rest runs gh api without --paginate, so list reads (pulls/{n}/comments, reviews, issue comments) return only the first page (~30 items): snapshot and poll are page-1-complete, not whole-PR-complete. Add --paginate to the adapter's list GETs + caller tests, in the retained gh client of the carved prgroom (D13/S8) — the verdict harvester inherits this path. Admission: prevents = silent truncation of review threads in verdict harvesting; cost = adapter change + tests; remove-if = retained gh client is replaced.

title: prgroom carve: merge-guard gh-auth probe — 5xx is not an auth failure (was abn9.8.49)
description: Implement docs/specs/2026-07-17-prgroom-preflight-gate.md §3 in the carved prgroom (D13/S8): replace the gh auth status preflight with a status-classified probe of repos/{owner}/{repo}; 401/403 → auth/access message, 5xx/network/unparseable → 'GitHub API degraded (HTTP nnn) — not an auth failure; retry when the incident clears'; BOTH paths still exit 3 (fail-closed preserved, only diagnosis changes). Admission: prevents = misdiagnosed GitHub outages triggering re-auth churn and false escalations (recurred in real incidents); cost = probe change + tests; remove-if = merge-eligibility evaluation replaces the preflight entirely.

title: prgroom carve: _ci_state ignores classic commit-status on mixed-CI repos (was abn9.8.33)
description: poll_pr._ci_state (packages/prgroom/src/prgroom/lifecycle/poll.py) reads check-runs first and consults combined-status only when zero check runs exist; on repos posting BOTH Actions check runs AND a classic Status-API check on the same head SHA, a failing classic status is invisible — ci_state can report success while a required classic status is red, letting merge eligibility pass a red PR. Fix in the carved prgroom (D13/S8): merge both rollups, failure in either → fail. Admission: prevents = false-green merge eligibility; cost = small poll.py change; remove-if = carved merge-eligibility evaluation drops combined-status by design.

title: bd dolt server-lifecycle tracking gives false negatives (status/stop miss a live server)
description: Discovered during V3 (SAVEPOINTS/2026-07-21-beads-export-v3-report.md): a live dolt sql-server holding the noms LOCK was invisible to bd dolt status/stop — stale port-tracking bookkeeping. Any cold-copy/backup runbook must corroborate with ps/lsof on the expected port before copying. Action: add the corroboration step wherever backups are scripted; consider an upstream beads report. Note: this project switched to embedded mode at the 2026-07-22 reset, which sidesteps the class locally. Admission: prevents = corrupt cold-copies in unattended runs; cost = runbook note; remove-if = bd fixes upstream or server mode is never used again.
